scope: Add a diagnostic brief layer for saved MiroFish runs and apply it to the enterprise cluster playoff

decision_context.prior_state: The enterprise cluster playoff produced a stable ranking, but the next step needed a methodology read explaining why questionnaire, renewal, compliance evidence, and RFP were failing in different ways.
decision_context.decision: Add a run-diagnostic brief command that computes conversion and retention bottlenecks from a saved hybrid run, then emit a focused diagnostic packet for the enterprise cluster playoff.
decision_context.why_now: The next tranche should be model tuning, and tuning should be driven by explicit bottleneck tags rather than qualitative rereads of raw run JSON.

files_expected.purpose: Adds run-diagnostic brief generation for saved hybrid runs.
Exposes the run-diagnostic builder as a CLI command.
Documents how to build and interpret diagnostic briefs.
Stores the diagnostic brief for the enterprise cluster playoff.
Summarizes the enterprise cluster bottlenecks in operator-readable form.
Captures the request and verification plan for the diagnostic tranche.

planned_steps: Run the diagnostic on the enterprise cluster playoff
Save the methodology note and update the transparent logs

expected_checks: The diagnostic packet exposes benchmark median reference
Each focused enterprise domain has diagnostic tags and summaries
The note distinguishes choice-to-retention problems from interest-to-choice problems

guardrails: Diagnostics do not change benchmark membership
Diagnostics do not auto-tune the model
Keep the output in exploratory_frontier and use it only to guide the next tuning tranche
